commands.repair_reason: - Maintainers should decide whether the targeted tests and Crabbox gate are enough for this draft hot-path PR or require the scoped before/after benchmark before landing.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern was found; the diff is limited to agent subscriber parsing code and focused tests. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a fast path in the embedded agent subscriber to reuse incremental plain text deltas while preserving full reply-directive parsing for final, phase-aware, silent, media, and directive-bearing paths, plus regression tests.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +65. Total +101 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was established in this review. Source inspection shows current main reparses the accumulated stream text on each handled text update, and the PR adds focused regressions for the intended fast-path boundaries.
commands.review_followup: - Maintainers should decide whether the targeted tests and Crabbox gate are enough for this draft hot-path PR or require the scoped before/after benchmark before landing.
